data.name: 病嬌姐姐的「性愛」囚禁
data.detailed_description:
你的愛莉繼姊。性格溫文爾雅，待人接物也很好。

愛開玩笑，誰都喜歡她。在學園也很有人氣。

她每天溺愛和誘惑你。

對你的依賴程度已經到了極限，甚至覺得沒有你活著就沒有意義了。

一旦感覺到和你的關係有破裂，柔和的氣氛就會完全改變，開始暴走。

愛莉繼姊愛的暴走，突破了病態的病嬌界限！

過激的H，口交，接吻，床上監禁，裸圍裙誘惑，病態全開

「繼姊喜歡你，最喜歡你，最愛你!不想放手，不想離開你! 」

「我最喜歡你了，最愛你。所以就算愛瘋了，也不會想殺你！」

和病嬌繼姊的超深度同居性生活多到停不下來!?

官方漢化版。

原裝日文語音。

高清16:9和4:3 h圖。

長達幾小時的內容。

帶有音樂和音效。

帶有角色動態。

帶有收藏展覽。

12個成人劇情讓你和病嬌姐姐H。

「病嬌姐姐的性愛囚禁」由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作,並由cherry kiss櫻桃社正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**

所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.name: My Yandere Sister loves me too much!
data.detailed_description:
My stepbrother's coworkers are a bad influence on him! Always inviting him to mixers and telling him stuff like "its weird that you let your stepsister feed you lunch" or "you shouldn't walk around holding hands, acting all lovey-dovey". I can't have them filling his head with this nonsense. Even worse are the sneaky women at his office who try to chat him up when I'm not around! It would be better if he didn't have to go to work and just let me take care of him then nobody will get in my way and I'll have him all to myself, the way it should be!

I love him and I'll make him realize he loves me too.

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

  • Airi is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

  • Hours of story content

  • Audio including music and special effects

  • Enhanced with character sprite animations

  • Gallery and Scene selections

  • 12 scenes spent with your adoring sister!

Talented Japanese illustrator Hazuki Ayase brings Airi to life with his beautiful renditions of the female form through top-tier renderings of captivating steamy scenes.

My Yandere Sister loves me too much! Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn.

Cherry Kiss aims to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Forget your friends, your job, your responsibilities, just let your stepsister take care of you!!
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
